name: hook_mate_puzzle
headline: The Hook Mate! 🪝
hook_text: Black to move: Can you find the hook?
details: Use the Rook and Knight to create an unbreakable net around the White King.

youtube_metadata.title: The Brutal Hook Mate! 🏁 #ChessPuzzles
youtube_metadata.description:
Watch how the Knight and Rook create a 'hook' pattern to deliver a crushing blow. 

Solution: 1... Ng4 2. h3 Rxg3# 

Subscribe for more daily tactics!

name: back_rank_decoy
headline: The Queen's Sacrifice!
hook_text: White to move: Sacrifice for the win?
details: A classic back-rank weakness. Can you force the Black Rook out of position?

youtube_metadata.title: Insane Queen Sacrifice! 👑 #ChessTactics
youtube_metadata.description:
Sometimes you have to give up the Queen to get the King. 

1. Qa8 Rxa8 2. Rb8# 

Did you see it? Let us know in the comments!
